abstract.para: Install the core packages required to scan and remediate &slem; with &openscap; and the &ssg;.

section.title: Installing the core packages
section.para: The following two packages are required for all scanning and remediation workflows described in this article:

listitem.para: openscap-utils: provides the oscap and oscap-ssh command-line tools.
scap-security-guide: provides the &ssg; security content, including DataStream files, profiles, fix scripts, and &ansible; playbooks.

section.para: Because &slem; is an immutable system, packages must be installed using &tr-up;. After installation, a reboot is required to switch to the new snapshot.

step.para: Reboot the system to switch to the new snapshot:

note.para: GUI tools such as SCAP Workbench are not available on &slem;. If you need to create a tailoring file to customize a profile, do so on a separate machine and transfer the file to the &slem; system. You can then apply it using the --tailoring-file option with oscap.
